Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0602
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, wanna go to Tartarus later?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apathy Syndrome has been on the rise or somethin', right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, there are all those weird rumors goin' around school, so I feel antsy just doin' nothing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}In times like these, we just gotta let off steam in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_0602
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, wanna go to Tartarus later?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Apathy Syndrome has been on the rise or somethin', right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are all those weird rumors goin' around school, so I feel antsy just doin' nothing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}So why don't we go beatin' up a crap ton of Shadows? Y'know, as a stress reliever?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_OK_0602
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, Apathy Syndrome has been on the rise or somethin', right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are all those weird rumors goin' around school, so I feel antsy just doin' nothing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, I hope we get to do another operation where we throw down with a big Shadow and WAPOW! Give it a good ass-whoopin', y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}...{f 4 1}, could you free up your day tomorrow for me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's a lot to be done for Fuuka Yamagishi's case.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I'm going to require your assistance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}If you have any urgent affairs, then I suggest you settle them by the end of today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0609
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-senpai went to the hospital to pay Yamagishi-san a visit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if she's all right...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0610
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Kirijo-senpai and Sanada-san are both visiting Yamagishi today, too. So that leaves us on standby at the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if she'll come home soon... Fuuka-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_0610
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}She hasn't agreed to join though, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I hope she's not being pressured by them or anything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0612
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh yeah, I hear Fuuka's moving into one of the rooms on the third floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}But the girls put their foot down when I offered to help—said us guys aren't allowed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, looks like she'll be coming here pretty early tomorrow. Exciting stuff, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0617
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Should we head to Tartarus later?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We have some time before the next full moon, but the enemies are growing stronger, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I'd like to train with Polydeuces even more... How about it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_OK_0617
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've made some progress for the time being... But we still can't afford to drop our guard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even though we have some time until the next full moon, the enemies are growing stronger, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let me know if you plan on going to Tartarus. After all, you always gotta push your limits when training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0619
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, dude, I'm running to the store real quick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_0622
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, did you hear? Something's up with the equipment in the command room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Junpei's looked at it, but it seems like it's been breaking down a lot recently, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I honestly had no clue what I was looking at. {f 4 1}-kun, could you check it out later?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}There are two weeks until the next full moon. Let's train and build up our strength while we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0623
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}Oh, it's time for another boss fight!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Heh, wonder what we're gonna be up against this time. Not gonna lie, I'm gettin' kinda excited.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITSURU_TARTAROS_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}With both Akihiko and Iori around, serious conversations are starting to sound like a joke.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Speaking of Akihiko, has he returned yet?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_0623
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Guess not. Maybe he went for a quick bite somewhere?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_0626
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm heading out for a bit. I'll be back late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0616ALPHA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}(Message for use in alpha) Dorm life tutorial. Explanation of the dorm life icons and such.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go get it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
